name: App workspace header search navigation
notes: Header is always rendered in the authenticated workspace; its three nav links (Documents, Upload, Search) update App's activeSection state via the onNavigate callback.
Clicking 'Search' (Header.jsx:43) calls onNavigate('search'), which highlights 'Search' in the Sidebar — the SearchBar is always visible regardless of activeSection.
The SearchBar (SearchBar.jsx) is mounted in App.jsx, not inside Header; search submission is routed through an imperative ref (App.documentGridRef) to DocumentGrid.handleSearch.
Auth guard: App.render() returns <LoginForm /> before rendering the Header if AuthContext.isAuthenticated is false; the Header itself has no auth logic.
